card_name_verified: Southwest® Rapid Rewards® Plus Credit Card (Chase, $99 AF)
_review_reason: Per Convention C: all benefits points-denominated, % off, or qualitative. No USD statement credits. Specifically: 3,000 anniversary points (points), 10,000 Companion Pass qualifying points (points), 10% anniversary promo code (% off), 25% inflight purchases (% off), 2 EarlyBird Check-Ins (qualitative), free first checked bag (qualitative).
